source.authority: Financial Administration of the Slovak Republic
source.scope: Official-source-backed Slovakia calendar-year 2026 annual section 4(1)(a) individual income-tax scale.

SK.notes: Annual income tax under the 19%, 25%, 30% and 35% section 4(1)(a) scale on caller-confirmed tax base. Allowances, business-income schedules, contributions and payroll reconciliation remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 section 4(1)(a) income tax on caller-confirmed annual tax base.
